description: kind-cluster Renovate config. Two-part commit message convention:
`commitMessagePrefix: chore(all):` (below) overrides with a scope so commits read
'chore(all): update ...' for portfolio consistency. Both are required — the preset
alone produces 'chore: ...' (no scope), and `commitMessagePrefix` alone is treated
as a literal string prefix without semantic-commit grouping.

customManagers.description: Update Makefile tool versions via inline renovate comments
Update shell-script and cloud-init tool versions via inline renovate comments
matchStrings: # renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>[A-Za-z0-9_./:-]+)( extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))?( registryUrl=(?<registryUrl>\S+))?( versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?\s*\n[ \t]*[A-Z_]+=(?<currentValue>\S+)

customManagers.description: Update Dockerfile ARG default values via inline renovate comments

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Group GitHub Actions into one PR

Disable digest pinning for ALL custom.regex-tracked docker pins. Covers two file groups: (a) Makefile dev tools (MERMAID_CLI_VERSION, PLANTUML_VERSION, PUML2DRAWIO_VERSION, KIND_NODE_IMAGE, ACT_UBUNTU_VERSION) — preventive per /renovate skill's `docker:pinDigests × version-bump` collision class; (b) scripts/*.sh workload-image refs (hashicorp/http-echo, gcr.io/.../hello-app, ghcr.io/.../golang-web, registry, itsthenetwork/nfs-server-alpine) — the shell-script regex captures `IMAGE=foo/bar:${X_VERSION}` constructions which cannot carry an `@sha256:...` digest in the variable's value, so the Pin Dependencies operation kept failing on these (Dependency Dashboard 'Repository Problem: Error updating branch'). Production-runtime docker pins (Dockerfile FROM, k8s/*.yaml image: fields) keep their digest pins via the dockerfile + kubernetes managers respectively.

Keep workload image bumps in sync across k8s/*.yaml and scripts/*.sh — YAML image: field (kubernetes manager) and matching scripts' IMAGE= variable (custom.regex on shell) land in one PR so `kind load docker-image` and `kubectl apply` can't disagree on the tag. matchUpdateTypes scopes the rule to per-package updates only — Renovate's Pin Dependencies operation bundles many unrelated deps into one PR with no single {{depName}} for the template to resolve, which produced a literal `workload-image-depname` branch name and an `Error updating branch: update failure` in the Dependency Dashboard. Letting `pin` fall back to default grouping fixes the collapse.

Keep kubectl in sync across .mise.toml (mise manager) and Makefile KUBECTL_VERSION (custom.regex, used as a Dockerfile --build-arg). The Makefile pin is `# renovate: datasource=github-tags depName=kubernetes/kubernetes`; the mise pin extracts to `aqua:kubernetes/kubectl`. The `kubernetes/kubectl` entry is a defensive alias in case Renovate's docker-tag manager surfaces that depName form for any future Dockerfile reference.

Keep kind in sync across .mise.toml (mise manager), vm/cloud-init.yaml (custom.regex), and the Makefile KIND_NODE_IMAGE pin (kindest/node). The kind binary and its node image are released together per KinD release notes — grouping them lands the coupled bump in one PR instead of two.

Suppress lookups for the local registry image. `make registry` wires containerd to localhost:5001 for in-cluster development; Renovate cannot reach localhost. The tag is templated into the manifest at apply time by `scripts/test-registry.sh` (single source of truth = HELLO_APP_VERSION there, Renovate-tracked via the upstream gcr.io/google-samples/hello-app pin), so the hardcoded tag in `k8s/helloweb-deployment-local.yaml` is just a fallback for direct kubectl apply.
